fiction.title: YESTERYEAR
fiction.author: Caro Claire Burke
fiction.description: Natalie Heller Mills, a privileged tradwife social media influencer, wakes up to find she is living in the comparatively difficult reality of 1855.

fiction.title: THE CORRESPONDENT
fiction.author: Virginia Evans
fiction.description: Letters from someone she used to know push Sybil Van Antwerp toward revisiting her past and finding a way to forgive.

fiction.title: PURPLE STATE
fiction.author: Dana Perino
fiction.description: A public relations professional goes with two of her friends to a swing district in Wisconsin and meets a guy with a different perspective.

fiction.title: A WOMAN'S PLACE
fiction.author: Danielle Steel
fiction.description: After the sinking of the Titanic takes her father, Lady Victoria Oldbrooke marries an older industrialist and eventually steps into his business.

fiction.title: HOPE RISES
fiction.author: David Baldacci
fiction.description: The second book in the Walter Nash series. Using an alias and some lethal skills, Nash works to bring down a global criminal operation.

nonfiction.title: WHEN WE SEE YOU AGAIN
nonfiction.author: Rachel Goldberg-Polin
nonfiction.description: A mother recounts the capture of her son, Hersh, from the Nova Music Festival and his subsequent execution.

nonfiction.title: STRANGERS
nonfiction.author: Belle Burden
nonfiction.description: Burden retraces her marriage of 20 years in search of clues to help shape her understanding about its demise and to find a way forward.

nonfiction.title: FAMESICK
nonfiction.author: Lena Dunham
nonfiction.description: The author of “Not That Kind of Girl” evaluates the effects that pursuing her creative endeavors had on her.

nonfiction.title: LONDON FALLING
nonfiction.author: Patrick Radden Keefe
nonfiction.description: The author of “Say Nothing” details the efforts by the parents of a 19-year-old Londoner to uncover the truth about his mysterious death and secret life.

nonfiction.title: THE FUTURE IS PEACE
nonfiction.author: Aziz Abu Sarah and Maoz Inon
nonfiction.description: A Palestinian and an Israeli share reflections from the journey they took together over the course of a week.
